# unix-socket-switcher

Unix socket proxy/switcher daemon with glob-based target discovery.

## Radicle note

unix-socket-switcher uses [Radicle][radicle] as a primary distributed code collaboration platform,
and Github repo is only a read-only mirror.

Head to [unix-socket-switcher's Radicle site][project-radicle] for an up to date version and more information.

[radicle]: https://radicle.xyz
[project-radicle]: https://app.radicle.xyz/nodes/radicle.dpc.pw/rad:zLQPt8d32SDAX4rzqBhrZ9pNC9Wc
